description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular, boxy structure with a series of parallel, evenly spaced slats or ridges running across its top surface, giving it a modern, industrial look. The front face is distinguished by a bold horizontal black strip, likely indicating the drawer access area, while the rest of the cabinet is a light gray or off-white color. The sides and back are plain, with the top slats extending slightly over the edges, creating a subtle overhang. The top view reveals the slatted design in full, while the front and rear views show vertical notches that may correspond to drawer separations. There are no visible handles or label holders, suggesting a minimalist design, possibly with push-to-open drawers. The overall construction appears to be metal, suitable for secure document storage in professional environments.
description: A modern, rectangular filing cabinet with a slatted top, bold black front strip, and minimalist design in light gray metal. The cabinet features no visible handles or label holders, emphasizing a sleek, industrial aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold black strip across the top front, with the slatted top surface visible and a clean, minimalist facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the slatted top extending over the edge, and vertical notches suggesting drawer separations.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, uninterrupted surface and the slatted top visible, lacking any black strip or drawer access features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with mirrored features to view 1, including the slatted top and vertical notches, and some mirrored text visible on the side.
